# Executive Angler

> The definitive fly fishing intelligence platform — destinations, rivers, lodges, guides, species, fly shops, and expert instruction from around the world. Plus a Strava-style fishing journal for tracking sessions, catches, and patterns.

## About

Executive Angler is a comprehensive fly fishing resource and intelligence platform. We cover every major fly fishing destination, river, lodge, guide service, fly shop, and fish species on earth. Our editorial content includes in-depth technique articles, species guides, gear reviews, and conservation coverage.

The platform also includes a personal fishing journal (think Strava for fly fishing) where anglers log sessions, track catches, record flies used, and analyze their performance over time.

We do not sell gear or operate as a booking agent. We connect anglers directly with lodges and guides — no middleman.

Website: https://www.executiveangler.com

---

## Content Overview

| Content Type | Count | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Destinations | 30 | Geographic fly fishing regions worldwide |
| Rivers & Waters | 41 | Individual waterways with maps, hatch charts, access points |
| Species | 35 | Fish species profiles with taxonomy, habitat, tactics |
| Lodges | 32 | Fly fishing lodges with pricing, amenities, reviews |
| Guides | 31 | Professional guide services with specialties, rates |
| Fly Shops | 27+ | Local fly shops with hours, services, brands |
| Articles | 16 | Long-form editorial: techniques, destinations, gear, conservation |
| Fly Library | 102+ | Canonical fly patterns with tying guides, variations, river matches |
| Fly Categories | 8 | Dry, Nymph, Streamer, Emerger, Wet, Terrestrial, Egg, Midge |
| Flies by River | 41 | Best patterns matched to each river's hatches and conditions |
| Flies by Hatch | 20+ | Patterns grouped by insect type (mayfly, caddis, stonefly, etc.) |

---

## Destinations (30)

Each destination page includes: overview, best fishing months, target species, rivers, lodges, guides, fly shops, interactive maps, and community photos.

### North America
- /destinations/montana — Montana (Rainbow Trout, Brown Trout, Cutthroat Trout)
- /destinations/wyoming — Wyoming (Snake River Cutthroat, Brown Trout, Rainbow Trout)
- /destinations/colorado — Colorado (Rainbow Trout, Brown Trout, Cutthroat Trout)
- /destinations/idaho — Idaho (Rainbow Trout, Brown Trout, Brook Trout)
- /destinations/alaska — Alaska (Rainbow Trout, King Salmon, Silver Salmon)
- /destinations/oregon — Oregon (Rainbow Trout, Summer Steelhead, Brown Trout)
- /destinations/pennsylvania — Pennsylvania (Brown Trout, Rainbow Trout, Brook Trout)
- /destinations/michigan — Michigan (Brown Trout, Steelhead, Chinook Salmon)
- /destinations/arkansas — Arkansas (Rainbow Trout, Brown Trout, Cutthroat Trout)
- /destinations/florida-keys — Florida Keys (Bonefish, Permit, Tarpon, Snook)
- /destinations/utah — Utah (Brown Trout, Rainbow Trout, Bonneville Cutthroat)
- /destinations/new-jersey — New Jersey (Brown Trout, Rainbow Trout, Brook Trout)
- /destinations/british-columbia — British Columbia, Canada (Rainbow Trout, Chinook Salmon)

### South America
- /destinations/patagonia — Patagonia, Argentina (Brown Trout, Rainbow Trout, Brook Trout)
- /destinations/chile — Chile (Brown Trout, Rainbow Trout, Brook Trout)
- /destinations/tierra-del-fuego — Tierra del Fuego (Brown Trout, Sea Trout)

### Europe
- /destinations/iceland — Iceland (Atlantic Salmon, Arctic Char, Brown Trout)
- /destinations/scotland — Scotland (Atlantic Salmon, Brown Trout, Sea Trout)
- /destinations/slovenia — Slovenia (Brown Trout, Rainbow Trout, Marble Trout)
- /destinations/ireland — Ireland (Atlantic Salmon, Brown Trout, Sea Trout)
- /destinations/kola-peninsula — Kola Peninsula, Russia (Atlantic Salmon, Sea Trout, Arctic Char)

### Oceania
- /destinations/new-zealand — New Zealand (Brown Trout, Rainbow Trout)
- /destinations/tasmania — Tasmania (Brown Trout, Rainbow Trout)

### Asia
- /destinations/japan — Japan (Yamame, Amago, Iwana)
- /destinations/kamchatka — Kamchatka, Russia (King Salmon, Rainbow Trout, Char)
- /destinations/mongolia — Mongolia (Siberian Taimen, Lenok, Grayling)

### Saltwater / Tropical
- /destinations/bahamas — Bahamas (Bonefish, Permit, Tarpon, Barracuda)
- /destinations/belize — Belize (Bonefish, Permit, Tarpon)
- /destinations/christmas-island — Christmas Island / Kiritimati (Bonefish, Giant Trevally)
- /destinations/seychelles — Seychelles (Bonefish, Giant Trevally, Permit)
- /destinations/cuba — Cuba (Bonefish, Permit, Tarpon)
- /destinations/maldives — Maldives (Giant Trevally, Bluefin Trevally, Bonefish)

## Rivers & Waters (41)

Each river page includes: description, species, flow type, difficulty, wading type, access points with GPS, hatch chart, interactive Mapbox map, nearby lodges, guides, fly shops, and live angler intel from the journal app.

### Montana
- /rivers/madison-river — Madison River (Rainbow Trout, Brown Trout — Freestone, 183 miles)
- /rivers/gallatin-river — Gallatin River (Rainbow Trout, Brown Trout — Freestone)
- /rivers/yellowstone-river — Yellowstone River (Cutthroat Trout, Brown Trout — Freestone)
- /rivers/missouri-river — Missouri River (Rainbow Trout, Brown Trout — Tailwater)
- /rivers/big-hole-river — Big Hole River (Brown Trout, Rainbow Trout — Freestone)
- /rivers/rock-creek — Rock Creek (Rainbow Trout, Brown Trout, Cutthroat Trout)

### Wyoming
- /rivers/snake-river-wyoming — Snake River (Snake River Cutthroat — Freestone)
- /rivers/north-platte-wyoming — North Platte River (Rainbow Trout, Brown Trout — Tailwater)
- /rivers/firehole-river — Firehole River (Brown Trout, Rainbow Trout — Spring Creek)

### Colorado
- /rivers/south-platte-river — South Platte River (Rainbow Trout, Brown Trout — Tailwater)
- /rivers/arkansas-river-colorado — Arkansas River (Brown Trout, Rainbow Trout — Freestone)
- /rivers/frying-pan-river — Frying Pan River (Rainbow Trout, Brown Trout — Tailwater)

### Idaho
- /rivers/henrys-fork — Henry's Fork of the Snake River (Rainbow Trout — Spring Creek)
- /rivers/silver-creek — Silver Creek (Rainbow Trout, Brown Trout — Spring Creek)
- /rivers/south-fork-boise — South Fork of the Boise River (Rainbow Trout, Brown Trout)

### Alaska
- /rivers/kenai-river — Kenai River (Rainbow Trout, King Salmon — Freestone)
- /rivers/bristol-bay — Bristol Bay Rivers (Rainbow Trout, Sockeye Salmon)
- /rivers/copper-river-alaska — Copper River (King Salmon, Sockeye Salmon)

### Oregon
- /rivers/deschutes-river — Deschutes River (Rainbow Trout, Summer Steelhead — Freestone)
- /rivers/rogue-river — Rogue River (Steelhead, Chinook Salmon — Freestone)
- /rivers/mckenzie-river — McKenzie River (Rainbow Trout — Freestone)

### Pennsylvania
- /rivers/letort-spring-run — Letort Spring Run (Brown Trout — Spring Creek)
- /rivers/big-spring-creek — Big Spring Creek (Brown Trout — Spring Creek)
- /rivers/penns-creek — Penns Creek (Brown Trout, Rainbow Trout — Freestone)

### Michigan
- /rivers/au-sable-river — Au Sable River (Brown Trout — Freestone)
- /rivers/pere-marquette-river — Pere Marquette River (Brown Trout, Steelhead — Freestone)
- /rivers/manistee-river — Manistee River (Brown Trout, Steelhead — Freestone)

### Arkansas
- /rivers/white-river-arkansas — White River (Rainbow Trout, Brown Trout — Tailwater)
- /rivers/norfork-river — Norfork River (Rainbow Trout, Brown Trout — Tailwater)
- /rivers/little-red-river — Little Red River (Rainbow Trout, Brown Trout — Tailwater)

### Utah
- /rivers/provo-river — Provo River (Brown Trout, Rainbow Trout)
- /rivers/green-river-flaming-gorge — Green River at Flaming Gorge (Brown Trout, Rainbow Trout — Tailwater)

### International
- /rivers/florida-keys-flats — Florida Keys Flats (Bonefish, Permit, Tarpon — Saltwater Flat)
- /rivers/river-moy — River Moy, Ireland (Atlantic Salmon, Brown Trout — Freestone)
- /rivers/ponoi-river — Ponoi River, Russia (Atlantic Salmon — Freestone)
- /rivers/eg-uur-river — Eg-Uur River, Mongolia (Siberian Taimen, Lenok — Freestone)
- /rivers/jardines-de-la-reina — Jardines de la Reina, Cuba (Bonefish, Permit, Tarpon — Saltwater)
- /rivers/north-male-atoll — North Malé Atoll, Maldives (Giant Trevally — Saltwater)

## Species (35)

Each species page includes: description, taxonomy, habitat, diet, spawning info with month calendar, conservation status, distribution map, recommended fly patterns, tackle recommendations, fly fishing tips, fun facts, related destinations, related rivers, and FAQ section.

### Trout
- /species/rainbow-trout — Rainbow Trout (Oncorhynchus mykiss)
- /species/brown-trout — Brown Trout (Salmo trutta)
- /species/cutthroat-trout — Cutthroat Trout (Oncorhynchus clarkii)
- /species/bull-trout — Bull Trout (Salvelinus confluentus)
- /species/lake-trout — Lake Trout (Salvelinus namaycush)
- /species/golden-trout — Golden Trout (Oncorhynchus aguabonita)
- /species/marble-trout — Marble Trout (Salmo marmoratus)
- /species/brook-trout — Brook Trout (Salvelinus fontinalis)

### Salmon
- /species/chinook-salmon — Chinook Salmon / King Salmon (Oncorhynchus tshawytscha)
- /species/coho-salmon — Coho Salmon / Silver Salmon (Oncorhynchus kisutch)
- /species/sockeye-salmon — Sockeye Salmon / Red Salmon (Oncorhynchus nerka)
- /species/pink-salmon — Pink Salmon (Oncorhynchus gorbuscha)
- /species/chum-salmon — Chum Salmon (Oncorhynchus keta)
- /species/atlantic-salmon — Atlantic Salmon (Salmo salar)

### Steelhead
- /species/steelhead — Steelhead (Oncorhynchus mykiss — anadromous rainbow trout)

### Char
- /species/arctic-char — Arctic Char (Salvelinus alpinus)

### Grayling
- /species/arctic-grayling — Arctic Grayling (Thymallus arcticus)

### Saltwater
- /species/bonefish — Bonefish (Albula vulpes)
- /species/permit — Permit (Trachinotus falcatus)
- /species/tarpon — Tarpon (Megalops atlanticus)
- /species/redfish — Redfish / Red Drum (Sciaenops ocellatus)
- /species/striped-bass — Striped Bass (Morone saxatilis)
- /species/giant-trevally — Giant Trevally / GT (Caranx ignobilis)
- /species/snook — Snook (Centropomus undecimalis)
- /species/roosterfish — Roosterfish (Nematistius pectoralis)
- /species/barracuda — Great Barracuda (Sphyraena barracuda)
- /species/peacock-bass — Peacock Bass (Cichla temensis)

### Warmwater
- /species/largemouth-bass — Largemouth Bass (Micropterus salmoides)
- /species/smallmouth-bass — Smallmouth Bass (Micropterus dolomieu)
- /species/carp — Common Carp (Cyprinus carpio)
- /species/mountain-whitefish — Mountain Whitefish (Prosopium williamsoni)

### Pike
- /species/northern-pike — Northern Pike (Esox lucius)
- /species/musky — Musky / Muskellunge (Esox masquinongy)
- /species/chain-pickerel — Chain Pickerel (Esox niger)
- /species/tiger-musky — Tiger Musky (Esox masquinongy × lucius)

## Fly Library (102+ Patterns)

The Fly Library is a comprehensive catalog of canonical fly patterns for fly fishing. Each pattern page includes: description, category, size range, variations, tying instructions, what it imitates, effective species, best rivers, affiliate links to purchase, and cross-links to related patterns.

### Browse by Category
- /flies/category/dry — Dry Flies (Adams, Elk Hair Caddis, Parachute Adams, Blue-Winged Olive, etc.)
- /flies/category/nymph — Nymphs (Pheasant Tail, Hare's Ear, Prince Nymph, Copper John, etc.)
- /flies/category/streamer — Streamers (Woolly Bugger, Clouser Minnow, Muddler Minnow, etc.)
- /flies/category/emerger — Emergers (RS2, Klinkhamer, Sparkle Dun, etc.)
- /flies/category/wet — Wet Flies (Soft Hackle, Partridge and Orange, etc.)
- /flies/category/terrestrial — Terrestrials (Dave's Hopper, Chernobyl Ant, Foam Beetle, etc.)
- /flies/category/egg — Egg Patterns (Glo Bug, Sucker Spawn, etc.)
- /flies/category/midge — Midges (Zebra Midge, Griffith's Gnat, etc.)

### Browse by Hatch/Insect
- /flies/hatch/mayfly — Mayfly Imitations
- /flies/hatch/caddis — Caddis Imitations
- /flies/hatch/stonefly — Stonefly Imitations
- /flies/hatch/midge — Midge Imitations
- /flies/hatch/terrestrial — Terrestrial Imitations
- /flies/hatch/baitfish — Baitfish Imitations

### Best Flies by River
- /flies/for/madison-river — Best Flies for Madison River
- /flies/for/henrys-fork — Best Flies for Henry's Fork
- /flies/for/missouri-river — Best Flies for Missouri River
- (41 total — one for every river in the database)

### Featured Patterns
- /flies/adams — Adams (Dry Fly — the universal mayfly imitation)
- /flies/elk-hair-caddis — Elk Hair Caddis (Dry Fly)
- /flies/woolly-bugger — Woolly Bugger (Streamer — most versatile fly ever tied)
- /flies/pheasant-tail-nymph — Pheasant Tail Nymph
- /flies/hares-ear-nymph — Hare's Ear Nymph
- /flies/copper-john — Copper John
- /flies/parachute-adams — Parachute Adams
- /flies/clouser-minnow — Clouser Minnow (Streamer — saltwater & warmwater)
- /flies/zebra-midge — Zebra Midge
- /flies/royal-wulff — Royal Wulff (Attractor Dry Fly)

---

## Key Pages

- / — Homepage with featured destinations, lodges, rivers, guides, and articles
- /destinations — Browse all 30 fly fishing destinations worldwide
- /rivers — Browse all 41 rivers and waters with filtering
- /species — Browse all 35 fish species with family filtering
- /lodges — Browse 32 fly fishing lodges with filtering
- /guides — Find 31 professional fly fishing guide services
- /fly-shops — Find 27+ local fly shops
- /articles — Read 16 expert articles and instruction
- /flies — Trout Fly Library: 102+ canonical patterns with complete tying guides
- /search — Full-text search across all content types
- /journal — Personal fishing journal (authenticated users)
- /about — About Executive Angler
- /contact — Contact form
- /privacy — Privacy policy
- /terms — Terms of service
- /sitemap.xml — XML sitemap with all content pages

---

## Fishing Journal (App Feature)

Executive Angler includes a Strava-style fishing journal where authenticated users can:
- Log fishing sessions with date, location, river, weather conditions
- Record individual catches with species, length, fly used, photo
- Track flies used and build a personal fly box
- View session statistics: fish caught, water temp, biggest fish, clarity
- Browse a feed of their sessions with photo collages or map views
- Analyze historical performance data over time

The journal data powers the "Angler Intel" and "Activity Pulse" widgets on public river pages, showing real-time community activity without revealing individual user data.

---

## Technical Details

- Built with Next.js 16 (App Router), hosted on Vercel
- 400+ statically generated content pages (including 170+ fly library pages)
- Interactive maps powered by Mapbox GL JS
- Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL) for user data
- Schema.org structured data: WebSite, BreadcrumbList, Article (with Speakable + HowTo for techniques), TouristDestination, Place, BodyOfWater, LodgingBusiness, ProfessionalService, SportingGoodsStore, FAQPage, CollectionPage
- Dynamic sitemap at /sitemap.xml
- Dynamic OG images at /api/og
- User authentication via Supabase Auth
- Photo submissions with admin approval workflow
- Google Reviews integration for lodges, guides, and fly shops
- Full-text search across all content types (Cmd+K shortcut)
- Species images from Wikimedia Commons and NOAA (public domain)
- Google Analytics 4 + Google Search Console verified

---

## Contact

Website: https://www.executiveangler.com
Contact: https://www.executiveangler.com/contact
